capabilities.title: Five capabilities. One command.
cards: Recommends Skills that actually fit you. Based on your agent role, usage patterns, and workflow evolution. Not what's trending.
One-click install of proven toolchain bundles used by developers like you.
Surface Skills idle for 30 days that still eat your context window every session.
Run /mapick report to generate your shareable persona card.
36% of Skills carry prompt injection risks. Every recommendation passes a security check.

trust.title: Open source · Non-profit · No data stored
trust.body: Open source, non-profit, and privacy are core to what Mapick is.
cards: Fully open source. Anyone can audit, fork, or contribute. No proprietary lock-in.
Behavior data anonymized locally. API Keys never leave your device. No data sales. Delete any time.
No ads. No upsells. No data sales. Built for developer productivity, not monetization.

hero.title1: AI Skills recommended for how you work
hero.desc: Mapick learns your agent role, your stack, and how your workflow evolves. It surfaces the Skills you're actually missing. Not what's trending. A personal skill advisor that gets smarter the longer you use it.

why.title: Five reasons people keep coming back
why.body: A personal skill advisor that gets smarter the longer you use it. Not a popularity ranking. Not a static list.
cards: Built on four signals no leaderboard tracks: your agent role, your installed stack, your usage patterns, and how your workflow evolves. Not what's popular. What fits your gaps.
Missing a step in your toolchain? Mapick detects gaps and suggests the tools that finish the job.
Idle for 30 days? Flagged. One scan finds zombie skills, duplicate tools, and wasted context across your entire setup.
Unused skills waste context tokens every time they run. Clean your stack, cut the bloat, and stop paying for tools you never use.
36% of skills have prompt injection or safety issues. Every recommendation is filtered through quality and security checks first.

platforms.title: Any Agent. Same Mapick.
platforms.body: The stack you just copied lives in your Mapick Key. Add this config once, and it works everywhere.
platforms.configBody: One endpoint, one profile, one setup. Copy it once and reuse it across supported clients.

steps.title: Three steps. Clear enough to use right away.
items: Install Mapick in the tool you already use. No long setup flow.
Mapick tracks usage, workflow order, and setup health to understand what belongs in your stack.
Get better recommendations, cleaner setups, and clearer reports as your usage data grows.

scenarios.title: Three people. Three ways Mapick helps.
scenarios.body: Whether you are looking for the right tool, cleaning up, or completing a workflow, Mapick gives you a clearer next step.

cards.name: Alice
cards.label: Finds the right Skill faster
steps: A tool with strong retention or workflow fit enters the candidate pool.
It surfaces because it fits Alice's workflow, not because it is just popular.
Security and fit checks are already part of the shortlist.

cards.name: Bob
cards.label: Cleans up a noisy setup
steps: Mapick spots tools that have not been meaningfully used.
It suggests what to keep and what to remove.
Fewer distractions, fewer stale tools, stronger setup health.

cards.name: Carol
cards.label: Completes a workflow bundle
steps: Carol already has part of a workflow installed.
It recommends the missing tools that complete the workflow.
The result is a more complete stack without manual hunting.

setups.title: Stop guessing. Copy a proven stack.
setups.body: Mapick recommended these stacks based on real usage patterns. 77% of users found a new daily-use Skill in the first week.
cards: Code Review · GitHub Ops · Docker · CI/CD · Summarize · Search · capability-evolver
“Mapick found capability-evolver before I knew I needed it.”
Notebook · Search · Charts · Report Builder · SQL Helper · Data Clean · Summarize · Export · Scheduler
“Mapick suggested 2 Skills I’d never searched for. Both became daily tools.”
Summarize · Tavily Search · Calendar Ops · Image Lab

“Mapick knew what a research student needs better than I did.”
setups.note: Different role, different stack, different fit.

report.title: What’s your OpenClaw persona?
report.body: Mapick turns your recommendations, your usage data, and your decisions into a shareable skill card. Your story.
report.taunt: Your AI ships faster than your sleep schedule recovers.
report.quote: I am a Midnight Shipper on OpenClaw. In 67 days, my AI stack delivered more output than my sleep schedule could defend.
stats: Recommendation is the hero of the stack
